title: AUCraft
description: Inspired by RLCraft, AUCraft aims to be more fair and balanced. Not affiliated with RLCraft in any way.
body:
# AUCRAFT

Inspired by RLCraft, AUCraft (Alternate Universe Craft) aims to create a brutal but balanced experience that only punishes your mistakes and avoids needless grinding.

Natural Health Regeneration is turned off but sleeping in a bed or bedroll can heal you back to full!

Survive extreme temperatures and keep your water canteens filled through [Tough As Nails](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-as-nails)!

Fight dragons and other fantasy monsters through the [Ice and Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons) mod!

Cast cool spells from [Iron's Spells and Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks)!

Enjoy a refreshed and difficult caving experience with [Caverns and Chasms](https://modrinth.com/mod/caverns-and-chasms), [Spelunkery](https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkery), and [Spelunkery+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spelunkery-plus)!

Find weird and wacky mobs across the world from [Species](https://modrinth.com/mod/species), [Spawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/spawn-mod), and [More Critters](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-critters).

Fight dangerous mini-bosses from [Luminous: Beasts](https://modrinth.com/mod/luminous-beasts)!

And enjoy various vanilla-like improvements through [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)!

-----

Spelunkery+ comes from outside Modrinth through its GNU General Public License. ([Source](https://github.com/TysonTheEmber/spelunkery_plus)).
